_comment: Content pipeline for the weekly Monday auto-blog. Each week = 2 topics (A = conversion, B = reach). 'type': 'evergreen' commits straight to main (auto-deploys live); 'circular' commits to a draft branch for approval. 'status': pending | done. The Monday task picks the earliest week where status=pending, writes real EN+HI content, and marks it done. Edit freely: add/remove weeks, change topics, reorder.

posts.workingTitle: How CCA + SETC exemption gives you an edge in Haryana Clerk jobs
posts.angle: Explain the SETC written-test exemption CCA grants for Clerk Post; who should do it; how it fits the recruitment path. Cross-link existing setc-exemption post.
